prompts.title: Minimal Lesson Outline Prompt
prompts.body: Create a concise lesson outline with objectives, activities, and assessment.

versions.body: Create a concise lesson outline with objectives, activities, and assessment.

workflows.name: Minimal Pedagogy Workflow
workflows.description: Simple one-step workflow for lesson outline drafting.
workflows.scopeAndConstraints: Single lesson; keep learner effort under 45 minutes.

steps.title: Draft lesson outline
steps.notes: Use provided topic, level, and duration. Keep structure clear and practical.
